jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Resonance
jsonLd.description:
Join the Resonance family as a Instructional Designer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Resonance:
Resonance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance!
